calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-02-2013 Off Calendar

Amended Ntc Of Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jun-10-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Vantree, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Christopher Land, Esq. appeared for plaintif Digitek, Inc.
No appearance by defendant Absolutely New, Inc.
Declarations of John A. Kithas and Leonard are admitted.
After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Digitek, Inc. and against the Defaulted Defendant Absolutely New Inc., as follows:

Damages/Principal - $26,703.67
Prejudgment Interest - $0.00
Attorney Fees - $1,000.00
Costs - $514.95, for a total judgment in the amount of $28,218.62
Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Ntc Of Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jun-04-2013 Granted Per Written Order

Off Calendar May-08-2013 Continued To Jul-17-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
